input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A person in a white chef coat holds a spatula in their mouth while leaning over a stove, holding a frying pan with tongs to inspect food. A lidded black pot sits on the next burner. A black refrigerator is on the left, and a framed picture hangs on the right wall. The person leans closer to the pan.</think><action>silent</action>

A lidded black pot sits on the adjacent burner. A black refrigerator is visible on the left, and a framed picture with text "Ansel The Moral P..." hangs on the right wall.
[2-6] The individual stands upright, the spatula now hanging from their collar. Holding tongs over the pan with the left hand, they gesture with their right hand and place it against the wall frame, looking toward the right side of the room.
[6-10] Turning to face the camera, the person lifts the tongs away from the stove and appears to speak. They lower the tongs to waist level and gesture outward with their right hand, fingers extended.
[10-14] The person lowers their right hand near the waist and looks down at the stove, positioning the tongs near the pan handle. Finally, they raise their right hand with fingers pointing downward while looking forward and speaking.

[14-18] The person in the white chef coat, with a black spatula suspended from their collar, faces forward and then looks down at the stove. Their right hand grips metal tongs over a frying pan containing food, while the left hand gestures near the pan handle. [18-24] Facing forward with an open mouth, the individual keeps the tongs in the right hand near the waist or pan. The left hand rests near a lidded black pot on the adjacent burner before lifting to gesture with an open palm and curled fingers. [24-28] The person looks down at the frying pan again, leaning slightly forward. Finally, facing the camera, they lift the black pot from the burner using their left hand while holding the tongs in their right hand.

[28-36] The person in the white chef coat holds a black lidded pot in the left hand, using the right hand to maneuver metal tongs near the stove grate and frying pan. [36-38] While holding the pot, the individual points an index finger at the food in the frying pan. [38-40] The metal tongs are placed on the stove grate. [40-42] The person uses the right hand to adjust the food in the pan while keeping the pot elevated in the left hand. [42-44] Finally, the black pot is transferred from the left hand to the right hand.

[44-46] A person wearing a white chef coat holds a black pot in their right hand, looking down near a black refrigerator adorned with magnets. [46-52] The scene shifts to a counter area with light wooden cabinets where the individual holds the black pot in their left hand, using a black ladle in the right to stir contents; a white plate with cooked food and a knife are visible on the white countertop. [52-54] The chef looks up to face the camera, appearing to speak and gesturing with their right hand while the left hand keeps the ladle in the pot. [54-58] They return their gaze to the black pot on the white countertop, continuing to stir the mixture with the black ladle while holding the handle, a black spatula hanging from their collar near the wooden cabinets.

recent_thinks: [58-60] The individual leans closer while stirring the black pot on the white countertop, holding the handle with the left hand and using a black ladle with the right. A black spatula hangs from their collar. A plate with food sits on the counter to the left near the sink.

[60-62] The chef stirs a white mixture in the black pot, holding the handle with the left hand and a ladle with the right. The camera zooms in on his face and upper body as he looks down, with the black spatula hanging from his collar.

[62-64] The person in the white chef coat continues stirring a white mixture in a black pot with a black ladle held in the right hand. The left hand grips the pot handle near the sink. A black spatula hangs from the collar. A plate with food remains on the counter to the left.

queries.question: What is the correct sequence of actions performed by the man wearing a white chef's coat in the first 20 seconds? A. Holding tongs -> Holding pan handle -> Holding tongs B. Holding pan handle -> Holding tongs -> Stirring with spatula C. Stirring with spatula -> Holding tongs -> Holding pan handle D. Holding tongs -> Stirring with spatula -> Holding pan handle

samples.output: <think>The person in the white chef coat stirs the white mixture inside the black pot using a black ladle. The ladle lifts a portion of the thick white substance. The black spatula remains suspended from the collar, and a plate with cooked food sits on the counter to the left near the sink.</think><action>silent</action>

- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
